roast-dark.purpose: Darker roast variant for gradients and tags.

glow-warm.purpose: Warm radial glow behind hero content.

display.purpose: Hero headlines only. One per page. 'Coffee made personal.'

headline.purpose: Section headers. 'The short version.' 'Be first in line.'

label.purpose: Eyebrows, hints, footer links. Lowercase, never shouted.

shadows.name: nav-scroll
shadows.purpose: Nav header shadow on scroll. Subtle, warm-tinted.

shadows.name: button-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary button lift on hover. Directional and warm.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Signature card lift on hover. Diffuse and grounded.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions. Expo-out feel.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Espresso fill, Paper text, full pill radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: #231A15; color: #F4EFE6; border-radius: 100px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), opacity 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.85; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 22px -12px rgba(35,26,21,0.55); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8772E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost button with border. For secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-block; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: transparent; color: #231A15; border: 1px solid #E0D5C7; border-radius: 100px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #5A4F47; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8772E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Signup form input. Paper bg, pill shape, Roast focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding: 0.875rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #E0D5C7; border-radius: 100px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; background: #F4EFE6; color: #231A15; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8A7F77; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #C8772E; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky header with logo, links, scroll shadow, and rainbow accent line.
components.html:
ka fe
  • Menu
  • Our story
  • Find us
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; border-bottom: 0.5px solid #E0D5C7; background: #F4EFE6; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-logo { font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.25rem; letter-spacing: -0.5px; color: #231A15; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-logo .ds-red { color: #C8772E; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #5A4F47; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #231A15; } .ds-nav-links a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -3px; width: 100%; height: 1.5px; background: #C8772E; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

components.name: Flavor Dot (Small)
components.description: 9px circular swatch for inline menu item flavor indicators.
components.css: .ds-flavor-dot { display: inline-block; width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 0.5rem; vertical-align: middle; position: relative; top: -1px; } .ds-flavor-ube { background: #8A6FB0; } .ds-flavor-sesame { background: #3A332E; } .ds-flavor-banana { background: #D8A24A; } .ds-flavor-matcha { background: #7FA05A; }

components.name: Flavor Dot (Large)
components.description: 30px circular swatch for signature cards. Scales on hover.
components.css: .ds-flavor-dot-lg { display: inline-block; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-flavor-dot-lg:hover { transform: scale(1.12); box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(200,119,46,0.10); } .ds-flavor-ube { background: #8A6FB0; } .ds-flavor-sesame { background: #3A332E; } .ds-flavor-banana { background: #D8A24A; } .ds-flavor-matcha { background: #7FA05A; }

components.name: Signature Tag
components.description: Small pill tag marking signature drinks on the menu.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #A85E1E; background: #F3E2CF; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 100px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview:
This is the visual language of a place where everyone belongs. The barista remembers your order. The taxi driver and the pour-over purist sit at the same counter. There's craft here — real craft, made from scratch — but it's never performed or explained to death. It just shows up in the cup.

The system practices warm minimalism: clean surfaces that breathe, but never cold or austere. Paper-warm backgrounds, hairline dividers, generous whitespace. The restraint creates room for what matters: the coffee, the story, the invitation. Every element earns its place.

What this system rejects: pretentious third-wave gatekeeping, generic chain-café corporate-ness, and the forced-artisanal aesthetic of reclaimed wood and mason jars.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-warm palette: cream backgrounds, espresso text, roast accents
Single typeface (Inter) in two weights — nothing to prove
Generous breathing room; density is earned
A flavor palette (ube, sesame, banana, matcha) that adds personality without overwhelming

rules.name: The Roast Scarcity Rule
rules.body: The primary accent (Roast) appears on ≤15% of any screen. Its warmth is the punctuation, not the sentence.

rules.name: The Flavor Dot Rule
rules.body: Flavor colors appear only as small dots (9px inline, 30px on cards) — never as backgrounds, never as large fills. They're garnish, not the dish.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter only. No pairing, no display font. The restraint is the statement.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Restraint Rule
rules.body: Eyebrows appear only where they add real information — location, timing, category. One per page, maximum.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as feedback (hover, scroll, focus) — never decorative, never at rest.

dos: Do use Paper (#F4EFE6) as the primary body background. The warmth is the identity.
Do use Espresso (#231A15) for primary text, never pure black.
Do use hairline dividers (0.5px) to separate sections.
Do let content breathe. Generous whitespace (4rem section padding) is the norm.
Do use motion as feedback: hover lifts, scroll reveals, focus transitions.
Do respect reduced motion. Every animation has a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do keep the accent (Roast) scarce. It should feel like a warm surprise, not wallpaper.
donts: Don't use pretentious third-wave coffee language. No 'artisanal,' 'curated,' or gatekeeping vibes.
Don't use generic stock photography. No people laughing at salads.
Don't use reclaimed wood textures, mason jar imagery, or chalkboard fonts.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe borders.
Don't add numbered eyebrows (01 / 02 / 03) to every section as scaffolding.
Don't use multiple typefaces. Inter is the only face.
Don't use flavor palette colors as backgrounds or large fills. Dots only.
Don't add shadows to resting elements. Flat by default; shadows are feedback.
